mnemonics.title: Structural Patterns Acronym
mnemonics.content: A Dog Can Play Football Beautifully: Adapter, Decorator, Composite, Proxy, Facade, Bridge

mnemonics.title: Adapter vs Decorator
mnemonics.content: Adapter Changes Interface, Decorator Adds Features (ACIDAF)

mnemonics.title: Pattern Purposes
mnemonics.content: Adapt Interfaces, Decorate Objects, Compose Trees, Proxy Access, Facade Simplify, Bridge Separate, Flyweight Share
